text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sitting down to eat with Special Week, I notice
that she isn't her usual cheerful self.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sorry... I seem to be sighing a lot lately, for some reason... Sigh.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I love racing, but it doesn't make me feel
excited...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
And food doesn't taste good to me either. I don't
know what's going on with me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like I need to rethink her race schedule to
keep her from burning out...
